## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on inbound sales processes and HubSpot implementation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritizing HubSpot setup for inbound, including pipeline stages, BANT criteria, and sequencing](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Aiming for swift transition from Adio to HubSpot, ideally before onboarding new AEs](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Focus on establishing foundational processes and reporting capabilities in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Need to define clear criteria for deal stage progression and implement required fields](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Implementation Strategy

  - [Joe to start building in HubSpot next week, focusing on core architecture](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Mariela to help with webinar list sequencing, starting emails by Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Emphasis on multi-touch (not yet multi-channel) approach for initial outreach](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Discussion on enforcing field completion for stage progression (e.g., closed loss details)](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Pipeline Stage Definitions

  - [Kyle created a document outlining pipeline stages](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Debate on when to move deals to "Engaged" stage (post-meeting occurrence vs. scheduling)](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Consideration of implementing BANT criteria as a requirement for moving to proposal stage](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Decision to use text fields for BANT, with potential for future automation](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

### Deal Creation and Management

  - [Need to clarify process for creating execution phase deals](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Challenge: accurately reflecting potential deal values (e.g., $15k standard vs. $60k/month potential)](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Plan to use Google Sheets with Apps Script for initial forecasting, pulling data from HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Sequencing and Reporting

  - [Immediate need for basic sequences: DQ, giving a chance, qualified (didn't book)](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Future consideration for additional sequences: closed-lost reasons, recent intros, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Emphasis on developing comprehensive reporting capabilities in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Key metrics: inbound leads, qualification rates, stage progression, forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Transition Timeline

  - [Aim to move off Adio by end of July/early August](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Priority on having HubSpot fully implemented before onboarding new AEs](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joe to implement deal stages in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Develop BANT criteria fields (text-based for now)](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Begin building basic sequences in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Start developing essential reporting dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Kyle to list out specific reporting questions/needs](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting for Friday to discuss inbound analysis and new form field capture](https://fathom.video/share/yq3fFbw4BfW91FW_n_8qf3pnDBJsCsVs?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
